abstract: A structure containing information about an authorization right or the authorization environment.
overview:
## Overview

When using an authorization item to contain a right, set the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/AuthorizationItem/name] field to the name of the right—for example, `"com.myOrganization.myProduct.myRight"`, the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/AuthorizationItem/valueLength] and [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/AuthorizationItem/flags] fields to `0`, and the value field to `nil`. For more information on naming rights, read [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/Security/Conceptual/authorization_concepts/01introduction/introduction.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP30000995]

When using an authorization item for the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/AuthorizationExecuteWithPrivileges] function, set the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/AuthorizationItem/name] field to [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kAuthorizationRightExecute], and the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/AuthorizationItem/flags] field to `0`. Set the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/AuthorizationItem/value] field to the full POSIX pathname of the tool to execute and the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/AuthorizationItem/valueLength] field to the byte length of the value in the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/AuthorizationItem/value] field.

When using an authorization item to contain environment data, set the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/AuthorizationItem/name] field to the name of the environment data—for example, [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kAuthorizationEnvironmentUsername]—and the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/AuthorizationItem/flags] field to `0`. Set the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/AuthorizationItem/value] field, in this case, to the actual user name and the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/AuthorizationItem/valueLength] field to the byte length of the value in the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/AuthorizationItem/value] field.

# AuthorizationItem

**Structure**

A structure containing information about an authorization right or the authorization environment.

## Declaration

```swift
struct AuthorizationItem
```

## Overview

When using an authorization item to contain a right, set the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/AuthorizationItem/name] field to the name of the right—for example, `"com.myOrganization.myProduct.myRight"`, the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/AuthorizationItem/valueLength] and [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/AuthorizationItem/flags] fields to `0`, and the value field to `nil`. For more information on naming rights, read [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/Security/Conceptual/authorization_concepts/01introduction/introduction.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP30000995]

When using an authorization item for the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/AuthorizationExecuteWithPrivileges] function, set the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/AuthorizationItem/name] field to [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kAuthorizationRightExecute], and the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/AuthorizationItem/flags] field to `0`. Set the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/AuthorizationItem/value] field to the full POSIX pathname of the tool to execute and the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/AuthorizationItem/valueLength] field to the byte length of the value in the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/AuthorizationItem/value] field.

When using an authorization item to contain environment data, set the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/AuthorizationItem/name] field to the name of the environment data—for example, [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kAuthorizationEnvironmentUsername]—and the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/AuthorizationItem/flags] field to `0`. Set the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/AuthorizationItem/value] field, in this case, to the actual user name and the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/AuthorizationItem/valueLength] field to the byte length of the value in the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/AuthorizationItem/value] field.

## Initializers

- **init(name:valueLength:value:flags:)**: Creates a new authorization item.

## Instance Properties

- **flags**: Reserved option bits.
- **name**: The required name of the authorization right or environment data.
- **value**: A pointer to information pertaining to the name field.
- **valueLength**: The number of bytes in the value field.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable

items.description: The required name of the authorization right or environment data.
items.name: name

items.description: A pointer to information pertaining to the name field.
items.name: value

items.description: The number of bytes in the value field.
